trigger: One or two file edit typo docs small CLI wiring
notes: Keep in main flow and avoid subagent overhead.

trigger: Need to locate docs source files tests or generated reports
validation_command: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m draft_room_intelligence.cli report-codex-context-routes data/reference/codex_context_routes.csv outputs/codex_context_routes
notes: Use read-only explorer only when the matching route is not enough.

trigger: Demo export site readiness presenter report or player detail issue
notes: Start from generated readiness reports before raw JSON.

trigger: Parser source coverage merge duplicate goalie stat or evidence problem
notes: Use reviewer after implementation because source contracts and evidence can regress silently.

trigger: Model score board score role bias consensus or EP evidence weighting
notes: Reviewer should check business credibility and unintended ranking shifts.

trigger: NHL AHL depth U23 pipeline team adjusted score or what-if franchise question
notes: Separate NHL-ready roster from AHL and prospect pipeline before changing fit logic.

trigger: Token consumption dashboard benchmark route measurement or audit question
validation_command: PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m draft_room_intelligence.cli report-codex-usage outputs/codex_usage/run_log.csv outputs/codex_usage_report
notes: Keep this lightweight and compare baseline vs routed runs.
